posts.author: JAL1741 (Jan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - I cannot setup any “Milestone within the Time” in my workspace. The tiock-the-box in the calendar view s missing. Other workspaces within my organization do not have the issue. Can you elaborate which settings I may need to change to fix the issue. I followed the “Timeline View and Widget”

tHanks

posts.author: pjimenez (Pedro Jimenez)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, creating a milestone a been much more difficult. It now has to be done in the gantt view.
